title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 494.440 - Data processing devices may be used in compiling lists
text:
494.440.  Data processing devices may be used in compiling lists. — In compiling and maintaining a list of prospective and qualified jurors and in summoning qualified jurors for service, the board of jury commissioners may use such data processing or mechanical devices as it considers sufficient and efficient to carry out the declared policy of sections 494.400 to 494.505.
(L. 1989 S.B. 127, et al.)
